events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Nova Sol wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Ember Clay dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
